message:
📖 Update INVENTORY.md and fix missing isDemoData flags (#443)

- Update INVENTORY.md counts: 110→143 cards
- Add 35 new cards to inventory (resources, events, deploy, AI)
- Add isDemoData: true flag to 5 cards that were missing it:
  - active-alerts.ts
  - network-overview.ts
  - security-issues.ts
  - storage-overview.ts
  - top-pods.ts
- Add demo data coverage stats to summary

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
